title: LaTeX Preview project config
description: Project-scoped config for the latex-preview VS Code extension. Place at workspace root as latex-preview.json.

mainFile.description: Path to the main .tex file (relative to workspace root). Empty/absent = use active editor.

debounceMs.description: Idle delay (ms) after typing stops before recompiling.

latexCommand.description: LaTeX driver binary on PATH. Default 'texify' (MiKTeX, no Perl needed). Other options: 'latexmk' (needs Perl on Windows), 'tectonic', 'pdflatex' (no bibtex passes). Adjust latexArgs to match.

latexArgs.description: Arguments passed to latexCommand before the .tex filename. Defaults are for texify; for latexmk use ['-pdf','-interaction=nonstopmode','-halt-on-error','-file-line-error'].

figureWatch.description: Glob patterns (workspace-relative) whose changes mark figures stale. Stale figures are regenerated before the next latex compile by running figureCommand.

figureCommand.description: Shell command (run from workspace root) to regenerate figures. Executed before latexmk when figures are marked stale. Empty = disabled.
